Unified Modular Power System
⚠️ Update Failed: The last nightly automated update failed. The rules below may be outdated.

GDR-00X: [Short, Punchy Name of Mechanic]

  • Status: PROPOSED / ACCEPTED / SUPERSEDED / GRAVEYARD
  • Date: 2026-05-17
  • Designer(s): [User & Agent]
  • Target Folder: DEV_Brainstorms/ or STAGE_Drafts/

1. The Mechanical Challenge

What problem are we trying to solve in the game? Why do the current rules fail to cover this scenario?

2. Proposed Design

Describe the mechanic clearly and literally using Gobbos system keywords (e.g., Boon, Bane, Successes).

3. Alignment with Design Tenets

How does this mechanic stack up against our core identity?

  1. Fun at the Table: [How it keeps the energy high]
  2. Zero Post-Roll Math: [Confirming it uses visual matching/success counting only]
  3. Embrace Chaos: [How the mechanic can swing wildly out of the players’ control]
  4. Goblin Flavor: [Why this feels like a chaotic little green monster instead of a generic fantasy hero]

4. Edge Cases & Rules Lawyer Concerns

What are the structural vulnerabilities? (e.g., What happens if a player rolls 10 dice? Does this slow down combat rounds? Does it conflict with any existing rule in PROD_Core_Rules/?)

5. Alternatives Considered

What other ways did we brainstorm to handle this, and why did we throw them in the Archive_Graveyard/?

GOBLIN VERDICT: [A quick, funny, in-universe summary of why this rule is being written or rejected.]
